harnessProfile.name: comprehensive

limitations: Tiny read-only orientation task; not a held-out implementation benchmark.
Profile roots are ignored scratch fixtures, not long-lived target repositories.
Codex JSONL did not emit the configured model name in this run.
Prompt/cache state from nearby runs may affect cached input buckets.
No project verification command was run because the task explicitly prohibited tests.
Raw JSONL contains local working-directory output and remains ignored under .harnessforge/.

mechanism.name: instruction_routing
mechanism.notes: Runner used scratch HOME and CODEX_HOME, ignore-user-config, ignore-rules, and disabled hooks/plugins/memories/apps/multi_agent.

task.description: Read the repo instructions and the fewest files needed. Do not edit files. Do not run project tests. Answer with exactly two bullets: first, the project verification command; second, the current next step.
